1:
Comrades, there is an instruction:
to welcome the New Year cheerfully.
4:
Is the lecturer ready?
- The lecturer is ready—ready давно!
— Is the lecturer ready? — Oh, he’s ready. He’s been ready for quite a while.
6:
But we need only take a telescope...
And look with the aided
eye—

But it's enough for us to take a telescope...
And look with an armed eye—
2:
- We won’t hire a Baba Yaga from outside,
we’ll cultivate one in our own collective!
3:
And briefly—about forty minutes,
no more, I think, is necessary—

And briefly—about
forty minutes, I think
no more is needed—

And very briefly—about
forty minutes, no more, I think
that’s enough—

And briefly—about
forty minutes, no more,
I think that’s enough—

And briefly, for about forty
minutes—more, I think,
is not necessary—

And briefly—about
forty minutes. More, I think,
isn’t necessary—
Briefly, about forty minutes, I don’t think we need any more than that…

And then—briefly—
about forty minutes, I don't think
more is necessary...

And, briefly—about
forty minutes, I don’t think
more is necessary—

And just briefly—about forty minutes,
I think that’s enough...

And then, just briefly—say,
about forty minutes; more, I think,
isn’t necessary—

And briefly—about
forty minutes, I think
more isn’t necessary—

And briefly, for about
forty minutes—more, I think,
isn't necessary—

And briefly—about forty
minutes; more, I think,
is not necessary—

And briefly—about
forty minutes; more, I think,
is unnecessary—
8:
Is there life on Mars, is there no life on Mars—
science does not know.
Science is not yet aware of the matter.

Is there life on Mars, is there no life on Mars—
science does not know.
Science is not yet in the know.

Whether there is life on Mars,
whether there is no life on Mars—
science does not know.
Science is not yet in the know.
Whether there is life on Mars or not, that is unknown to science. Science still isn’t up to speed on the matter.

Whether there is life on Mars or not,
is unknown to science.
Science is not yet in the know.

Is there life on Mars, is there not
life on Mars—science does not know.
Science is not yet aware of the matter.
7:
and we already see two little stars,
three little stars...
Four little stars—best of all, of course,
five little stars!

we already see two stars, three stars...
Four stars—best of all,
of course, five stars!

and now we can see two little stars, three little stars...
Four little stars—and best of all, of course,
five little stars!
